# Flex

A `Box` with `display: flex`. Useful for building flex layouts.

## Import

```jsx
import { Flex } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| direction | `"row" \| "column" \| "row-reverse" \| "column-reverse"` | `row` | Flex direction |
| wrap | `"wrap" \| "nowrap" \| "wrap-reverse"` | `nowrap` | Flex wrap |
| align | `string` | - | Shorthand for `alignItems` |
| justify | `string` | - | Shorthand for `justifyContent` |
| gap | `string \| number` | - | Gap between flex items |
| children | `ReactNode` | - | Flex items |

## Usage

```jsx
<Flex gap={4} align="center" justify="space-between">
  <Box>Item 1</Box>
  <Box>Item 2</Box>
</Flex>
```
